query: South Korea KOSPI foreign investor net buy/sell value weekly latest June 2026, recent trend in trillion won
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on KOSPI foreign investor net buy/sell activity:

**The dominant story is record-breaking foreign net selling** ("Sell Korea" wave) through June–early July 2026, even as the KOSPI itself surged ~92–101% YTD:

- **Latest cumulative:** 157.3 trillion won net-sold YTD through July 3, 2026
- **First half (Jan–Jun):** ~148–149 trillion won — the largest H1 net outflow on record
- **Monthly:** May ~44.7tn won, June ~48.6tn won sold
- **Record daily net-sell:** ~7.76tn won on June 29–30
- **Streak:** 8 straight sessions (June 19–29), extending to 11 consecutive days by July 6–7
- **One notable reversal:** foreigners net-bought +1.7tn won on June 12 (KOSPI +8% on Mideast ceasefire optimism)

**Drivers:** profit-taking/rebalancing after the massive rally, a weakening won (down ~6% in 2026), and reallocation to Japan. Samsung + SK Hynix = ~90% of selling. Retail investors absorbed it with ~105tn won in net buys. Notably, foreign ownership *rose* to 40.47% (from 36.65% in January) because price gains outpaced the outflows.

All findings are cross-validated across Korea Exchange data cited by Korea Times, Korea JoongAng Daily, Seoul Economic Daily, CNBC, and Benzinga, and delivered via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: Foreign investors may have more Korean stocks to sell
sources.snippet: Foreign investors sold 157.3 trillion won ($102.5 billion) of shares on the KOSPI this year through July 3, per Korea Exchange; index up 91.9%.

sources.title: Foreign investors' record Kospi sell-off may continue in second half as won weakens
sources.snippet: Record 148.32 trillion won net selling in H1; May-June combined 92.89tn won; record daily 7.76tn won; individuals bought 99.17tn won.

sources.title: Foreign Investors Dump 150 Trillion Won in KOSPI in First Half
sources.snippet: H1 net selling 149.04tn won; May 44.71tn, June 48.62tn; record single day 7.73tn won (June 29); Samsung 72.6tn, SK Hynix 57.1tn.

sources.title: Foreign investors dump Korean stocks at record pace as money flows to Japan
sources.snippet: Foreigners net-sold 149.05 trillion won ($97.4B) of Kospi shares in H1, largest first-half net outflow on record; money flowing to Japan.

sources.title: Kospi falls as foreign investors sell Korean stocks ahead of Q2 earnings
sources.snippet: July 3: institutions and foreigners sold combined 2.7 trillion won; individuals bought net 2.6tn; KOSPI closed 8,051.33 (-0.46%).

sources.title: Foreign Investors Return After a Month... Net Buying 1.7 Trillion Won in KOSPI
sources.snippet: June 12, 2026: foreigners net-bought 1.7 trillion won as KOSPI surged >8% on Middle East war-end expectations.

sources.title: Kospi, SK Hynix, Samsung Electronics: Why foreign investors are selling
sources.snippet: June 8 (Mon): foreigners net-sold ~1.24 trillion won (~$801M) of Kospi shares as of 11am SGT, per Korea Exchange data.

sources.title: KOSPI Plunges as Foreign Sell-Off Hits 11th Day Ahead of Samsung's AI Earnings
sources.snippet: KOSPI plunged >3.5% from intraday high on an 11th consecutive day of aggressive foreign selling ahead of Samsung Q2 earnings.

sources.title: Foreigners Dump $106.8 Billion of Kospi Stocks in First Half as Samsung Ownership Hits 16-Year Low
sources.snippet: Foreign net sellers of 148.316tn won on Kospi in H1; selling concentrated in Samsung and SK Hynix; Kospi surged 101.14%.

sources.title: Kospi selloff is rebalancing, not vote against South Korea: KRX CEO
sources.snippet: KRX CEO says selloff is portfolio rebalancing; Kospi grew 76% in 2025 and was up 108.85% YTD before June 3 selloff.
